examples: My eider brother is two metres tall.
Eider Lee didn't hear clearly, or Jack didn't speak clearly.
The report names three seabirds in jeopardy - the Kittlitz's murrelet, spectacled eider and ivory gull;
Dozens of eider ducks, cormorants and guillemots have all been found with contaminated plumage.
The Dunlin, Thistle, Northern Producer, Murchison, North Alwyn, Tern, Eider and North Cormorant platforms are also affected.
